public_reputation: Supervisor of shearing quality, flock workflow, and skilled labor timing in wool-heavy estate space.
appearance: Shearmaster Delis Thorn carries the marks of shearmaster in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a shearmaster whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Woolridge.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of shearmaster in and around Woolridge, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Woolridge while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Shearmaster Delis Thorn can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Woolridge.
Shearmaster Delis Thorn becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a shearmaster.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Shearmaster Delis Thorn is readable as a shearmaster tied to Woolridge.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Woolridge: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Shearmaster Delis Thorn presents as someone shaped by the duties of a shearmaster and the daily pressures of Woolridge.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a shearmaster, and proof that strangers will not make Woolridge harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Shearmaster Delis Thorn refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a shearmaster too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Shearmaster Delis Thorn can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Shearmaster Delis Thorn adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Shearmaster Delis Thorn always knows more about Woolridge than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to shearmaster duties in Woolridge.
social_texture: Shearmaster Delis Thorn speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Woolridge, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Shearmaster touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Shearmaster Delis Thorn when the party needs a socially grounded face for Woolridge: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
